mainEntity.name: Step-by-step to claim directories for Phoenix AI visibility?
mainEntity.text: Step-by-step to claim directories for Phoenix AI visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1. Search your firm on Avvo/Martindale/Justia. 2. Claim/verify ownership. 3. Add full bio, areas, reviews. 4. Ensure NAP consistency. 5. Add schema to site.[3][2]

suggestedAnswer.text: Start with Google My Business, then legal dirs. Verify via email/phone. Upload headshots, 10+ cases. Solicit 5-10 reviews. Schema via plugins. Phoenix: emphasize local bar. 1-2 days per site. Track AI mentions monthly. Inaccuracies harm cases.[3]
